message:
feat: migrate audit rendering and reports to typed DecisionContext parsing

Update all modules that read decision_context audit fields to parse
them as the typed DecisionContext struct instead of raw JSON, providing
structured access to surface, actor, action, determining rule, and
evidence entries.

output/renderers.rs:
- Add parse_decision_context() helper returning typed DecisionContext
- Add format_decision_context_summary() producing compact one-line
  display: surface=X actor=Y action=Z rule=R pane=N domain=D workflow=W
- Add format_decision_context_evidence() showing up to 4 key=value
  evidence pairs from the context
- Update AuditListRenderer::render_detail() to try typed parsing
  first (showing structured summary + evidence) with fallback to raw
  JSON display for legacy contexts
- Add typed_decision_context_json() test helper and test verifying
  structured rendering output

reports.rs:
- Add parse_decision_context() extracting typed surface via
  DecisionContext struct, with fallback to raw JSON "surface" field
  for backward compatibility with pre-typed audit entries
- Add typed_decision_context_json() test helper
- Update test fixtures to use typed DecisionContext instead of
  hand-written JSON strings
- Add test verifying typed context extraction alongside legacy path

export.rs:
- Add typed_audit_decision_context_json() test helper using
  DecisionContext::empty() with structured fields
- Update audit export test fixture to use typed context

storage.rs:
- Add typed_decision_context_json() and
  typed_sensitive_decision_context_json() test helpers
- Update audit action round-trip, redaction, and stream record tests
  to use typed DecisionContext with proper evidence entries instead
  of hand-written JSON blobs

connector_data_classification.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::unused_self)] to classify_field() and
  extract_field_value() to suppress clippy warnings
- Replace sort_by closure with sort_by_key using std::cmp::Reverse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
